violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Dishes and utensils were removed from sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods chicken, and ham in the 2 door lowboy. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Eggs were relocated at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Beans, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Beans were observed at 50 DF at the time of inspection and were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of grease build up. Hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

There was no employee present with food safety training at time of inspection, an on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the hot hold area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The low boy refrigeration unit was observed held at 54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrective Action - Eggs were voluntarily disposed of, other food items were moved a short period before (produce) to unit from working unit in basement. Items were moved to working unit. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the low boy in the kitchen. Door gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2 door low boy in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2023
